commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=18e300baef906cb3f72a9cc53821fd40a6cb50ef)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes gateway config validation so memory-watch FD warnings are emitted only after a bounded scan finds more than 2,000 Markdown files, with focused policy tests.

PR surface: Source +68, Tests +34. Total +102 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main warns on gateway memory-watch config shape, and the PR narrows that through a bounded scan. I did not run tests because this review is required to keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR is maintainer-labeled and needs branch-author or maintainer review for the remaining warning policy and availability tradeoffs rather than cleanup close or automated repair.

target.title: fix(config): warn only on large memory watch trees
target.body:
## Summary

- keep the existing gateway memory-watch warning surface checks, but require the configured memory directories to contain more than 2,000 markdown files before warning
- bound the startup directory scan by streaming entries and stopping after 20,000 scanned entries
- update validation-policy coverage so config shape alone does not warn, while a large memory directory still does

## Related

- Follow-up to #89185, which added the gateway memory-watch warning but warned on config shape alone.
- Refs #86613, where FD pressure was reproduced with large watched memory trees.

## Verification

- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/config/validation.ts src/config/validation.policy.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/validation.policy.test.ts`
- local scan benchmark for 20,000 temp markdown files: about 13-15 ms per bounded scan on this machine
target.author: romneyda

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
